Title: Visconti, Filippo Aurelio
Subject Area: ancient|Antique, the|Roman (ancient Italian culture or period)
Overview: Commissioner of Antiquities in Rome in Rome. Visconti was born to a scholarly family, the son of G. B. Visconti, the Commissioner of Antiquities in Rome in Rome after Johann Joachim Winckelmann. He worked with his brother, Ennio Guirino Visconti at the Louvre museum and succeed him as Commissioner of Antiquities in Rome. In 1808 he published the Vatican Chiaramonti antiquities with Giuseppe Antonio Guattàni.
